name: Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 8 oz curly or regular elbow macaroni
2 ounces light cream cheese, cut into small pieces, at room temperature
1 cup reduced-fat extra-sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Stir in macaroni and cook 8 minutes or until just firm-tender. Drain in a colander.
2. In the same pot, combine 1/2 cup milk and cornstarch; whisk until smooth.
3. Heat remaining 2 1/2 cups milk in microwave or saucepan until very hot. Add to the pot and stir over medium heat until sauce comes to a simmer.
4. Simmer, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened (about 1 minute). Remove from heat.
5. Add cream cheese, salt, and pepper; whisk until cheese melts and sauce is smooth.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a shallow 2-quart baking dish.
7. In a small bowl, toss together 1/4 cup cheddar cheese, 2 tablespoons Romano cheese, and bread crumbs until blended.
8. Add pasta and remaining cheeses to the sauce; stir until well combined.
9. Transfer mixture to prepared baking dish. Top with tomato slices and sprinkle with breadcrumb mixture.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until bubbly and browned on top.
